'''ât-z-t-ch''' ('''kataztechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:laboratorize|laboratorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laboratorize|laboratorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-z-t-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kataztechoko
|}
